description_long: This is a single-bladed axe with a robust wooden handle and a large, ornate metal blade. The blade features intricate white vine-like engravings across its surface, giving it a decorative and possibly ceremonial appearance. The handle is slightly curved, wrapped with cord near the lower end for improved grip, and tapers towards the base. The blade is affixed to the handle with a visible metal collar and a central rivet, suggesting a traditional mounting style. The axe head has a broad cutting edge and a pronounced beard, with the opposite side of the blade forming a rounded poll. The overall finish is matte, with the wood showing a natural brown tone and the metal blade displaying a dark, weathered look accented by the white engravings.
description: A decorative, single-bladed axe with a curved wooden handle, ornate white engravings on a broad metal blade, and a cord-wrapped grip.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top of the blade, showing the pointed tip and the metal collar securing the blade to the handle.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the ornate white engravings on the blade, the broad cutting edge, and the cord-wrapped lower handle.
description_view_2: The axe is viewed from the back, showing the poll of the blade and the full length of the handle with its grip details.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the mirrored engravings on the blade, the beard, and the curvature of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a rounded cross-section, cord-wrapped grip, and ergonomic shaping for secure holding.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad blade with a pronounced beard, rounded poll, and intricate white vine engravings; one sharp cutting edge.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and riveted mounting with a visible metal collar.
